test_scope: MLB Under Veto Layer - 5 Fixes Validation
summary: Comprehensive backend unit testing of 5 MLB Under veto fixes to prevent failed Under picks like Yankees @ A's 13-8 (Under 9.5 lost)

FIX_1_POWER_BAT_PRESENT.description: POWER_BAT_PRESENT rule when OPS > 0.770 blocks Under
details: Yankees @ A's case - home OPS 0.785 triggers BLOCKED
Bullpen real data with pitch_stress_index propagated correctly
Twins @ Pirates case - pitch_stress > 1.5 triggers BULLPEN_PITCH_STRESS_HIGH
Active series overs pattern detected (series_avg > 12, pitch_stress > 1.5)
No pattern detected when conditions not met

FIX_5_UNDER_MARKET_SELECTOR.description: Integration of veto + learning_cases in mlb_under_market_selector flow
details: Full Game Under with HIGH bullpen risk triggers rule
Full Game Under with LOW bullpen risk does NOT trigger
F5 Under preferred when bullpen risk is HIGH and edge is viable

key_findings: ✅ FIX #1: POWER_BAT_PRESENT rule correctly blocks Under when OPS > 0.770 (Yankees @ A's case validated)
✅ FIX #2: build_under_veto_context() successfully extracts home_team_ops/away_team_ops from multiple aliases
✅ FIX #3: home_bullpen_real/away_bullpen_real with pitch_stress_index correctly propagated and triggers BULLPEN_PITCH_STRESS_HIGH when > 1.5
✅ FIX #4: detect_mlb_under_warning_pattern() correctly identifies power_bat and active_series_overs patterns from MLB_SEED_CASES
✅ FIX #5: select_under_market_with_bullpen_risk() correctly triggers rule for HIGH bullpen risk and prefers F5 Under when viable
next_steps: Integration testing with mlb_day_orchestrator to verify end-to-end flow
API endpoint testing to verify under_veto and under_learning_rules exposed in pick_payload
Live MLB game testing to validate real-world behavior
